## Formalization for DateTimeDescription

| Property | Constraint |
|----------|------------|
| day | all xsd:gDay |
| hasTRS | has http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/ISO-8601/0/Gregorian |
| month | all xsd:gMonth |
| subClassOf | GeneralDateTimeDescription |
| year | all xsd:gYear |
